subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath been illumined by the lamp of Thy oneness and hath turned toward the seat of Thy throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی استضاء من سراج احدیتک و اقبل الی مقر عرش
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
